name: The Automation Engineer
effect: Replace manual processes with automated ones. This card is considered efficient.

clauses.name: AUTOMATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a manual process is identified: It is scheduled for elimination next quarter.

clauses.name: EXCEPTION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If an automated process encounters an edge case: A human is quietly reintroduced to handle it.

clauses.name: MAINTENANCE EFFECT
clauses.rule: After six months: The automation requires more maintenance than the process it replaced.

witness_quote: We only need to build it once.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Who wrote the script that runs the script?
